title: Night in December
writer: Bernhard Kellermann, Lilo Dammert, Hans Jacoby
actors: Pierre Blanchar, Renée Saint-Cyr, Jean Tissier
plot: In 1919, Pierre Darmont, a handsome, much-loved piano virtuoso, falls in love with Anne Morris, a young woman who shares his tender feelings. But, quite inexplicably, after an unforgettable night, Anne vanishes without trace. Twen...
